name: Worksport Ltd
summary: Worksport Ltd. designs, develops, and manufactures innovative products for automotive accessories, consumer electronics, and HVAC markets. Key products include hard-folding and soft tonneau covers for light trucks, the SOLIS solar-integrated tonneau cover, the COR portable battery system, and the Aetherlux Heat Pump developed through subsidiary Terravis Energy. The company protects its offerings through a growing IP portfolio covering tonneau covers, solar integration, portable power, hydrogen energy, heat pumps, and EV charging stations.
